raw_description:
Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, showers, TVs, and electric kettles. Additional amenities include pool or city views, interconnected rooms, and free WiFi.Exceptional Facilities:Guests enjoy an infinity swimming pool, fitness centre, restaurant, and bar. The modern, family-friendly restaurant serves Middle Eastern and international cuisines with halal, vegetarian, gluten-free, and dairy-free options.Convenient Location:Located in Doha, the hotel is 1.9 km from Al Arabi Sports Club and 6 km from Qatar National Museum. Nearby attractions include Diwan Emiri Royal Palace and Gulf Mall.Guest Satisfaction:Highly rated for its attentive staff, room cleanliness, and convenient location.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.1for a two-person trip.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at ibis Doha. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
